[ USER INPUT ] --> "The sentiment is bullish..." 
      |
      v
[ STEP 1: WITNESS GENERATION (CPU) ]
|  * QTT Decompression: Tensor cores expanded into Halo2 rows.
|  * Path Routing: 76% to Lookups, 24% to Arithmetic MACs.
|  * Result: A large matrix of Scalars (The "Secret" Data).
      |
      v
[ STEP 2: DATA TRANSFER (PCIe Bus) ] <--- [ FRAGMENTATION RISK ]
|  * Scalars are sent to GPU.
|  * Bases (Points) SHOULD be pre-locked (PrecomputeBases).
|  * Current Bottleneck: 1.1GB/8GB usage suggests constant reloading.
      |
      v
[ STEP 3: THE MSM ENGINE (GPU) ]
|
|   "c" Windowing (The Tuning Knob)
|   <--[ c=12 ]----------[ c=16 ]----------[ c=20 ]-->
|      Low VRAM         Optimal          OOM Crash
|      Slow TPS        88+ TPS           Fastest
|
|  * Bucketing: Scalars sorted into 2^c buckets.
|  * Point Addition: Massive parallel math on 3072 CUDA cores.
|  * 56°C -> 47°C Drop: Indicates GPU is idling/waiting for memory.
      |
      v
[ STEP 4: PROOF CONSTRUCTION ]
|  * KZG Commitment: Final polynomial "hash" created.
|  * Succinct Proof: 2,144 bytes generated.
      |
      v
[ STEP 5: VERIFICATION ] --> [ VALID ] (5-9ms on Zenith Network)
